zh.lifeSummary: 當William Vesey於1527年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可哈德利 哈姆萊特時，他的父親Robert Vesey37歲，母親Katherine Forth27歲。他於1552年2月14日與Joan Cutler在英國英格蘭素福爾可辛特萊善姆結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1577年7月4日在英國素福爾可享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Vesey于1527年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可哈德利 哈姆萊特时，他的父亲Robert Vesey37岁，母亲Katherine Forth27岁。他于1552年2月14日与Joan Cutler在英国英格兰素福爾可辛特萊善姆结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1577年7月4日在英国素福爾可享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vesey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Veazey
meanings: English (Rutland): nickname from Anglo-Norman French enveisé ‘playful’ (Old French envoisié), Latinized as invesiatus (compare medieval Latin invasus ‘possessed by a demon’) and paralleled by lascivus ‘wanton’. The first syllable was lost early, resulting in numerous dialectal and orthographic variants; only Lenfestey preserves the fuller form, with an intrusive medial -t-. There has also been some confusion with Vessey .
History: John Veazey came from England to MD in the late 17th century. Thomas Ward Veazey (born 1774) was a MD legislator and planter.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When William Vesey was born in 1527, in Hadleigh Hamlet, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Vesey, was 37 and his mother, Katherine Forth, was 27. He married Joan Cutler on 14 February 1552, in Hintlesham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 4 July 1577, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Vesey est né en 1527, à Hadleigh Hamlet, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Vesey, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Katherine Forth, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Joan Cutler le 14 février 1552, à Hintlesham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 juillet 1577, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

Februar 1552 in Hintlesham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Joan Cutler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. Juli 1577 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Vesey è nato il nel 1527 nel Hadleigh Hamlet, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Vesey, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Forth, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Joan Cutler il 14 febbraio 1552, nel Hintlesham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 luglio 1577, nel Suffolk, England, all'età di 50 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William Vesey(이)가 1527년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 하들리 함렛에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Vesey(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Forth(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1552년 2월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 인틀레샤에서 Joan Cutler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1577년 7월 4일 영국 수폴크에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.
